title: Web Security Controls & Defense-in-Depth
description: A flowchart illustrating the layered, defense-in-depth approach to web application and network security as covered in Wiley's materials, showing how different security controls work together to protect an asset.
relationships: Client request is filtered by Firewall
Allowed traffic is inspected by WAF for web attacks
Secure Application processes request following best practices (e.g., input validation)
Application queries Database using parameterized queries
All layers are governed by and enforce overarching Security Policies
